case_title: ANSELMO PHILLIP VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $865.00 FILED BY ANSELMO PHILLIP AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT CITY TOWING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANSELMO PHILLIP IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT CITY TOWING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION WAS DENIED BY JUDGE MEG AN MADDEN ON 11/8/91 AND PARTIES NOTIFIED
